free_text: A comparison of reactions induced by medium-energy 3He
and 4He ions in heavy target nuclei
Ta, W, Re targets consisted of foils stamped from thin
sheets of the metals using a die of known diameter.
In bombardments of enriched 186W, samples of oxide
powder were wrapped in high purity Al foil.
Pb targets were prepared by electrodeposition onto Ni
Bi targets were prepared by vacuum evaporation onto Al
Target thickness were determined in all cases by
weight and area measurements, ranging from 80 to
Beam energy resolution was 0.5 MeV FWHM. Energy spread
of beams degraded to 20 MeV was 1.5 MeV FWHM.
